title: Global Tweaks
body:
# **Description:**


Global Tweaks is a modification that introduces a variety of enhancements and fixes, bridging the gap between various mods and vanilla minecraft. Currently, it includes several tweaks designed to improve gameplay and user experience.

Mods included:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Blessfulled
Carry-On
Dungeon Crawl
Dynamic Trees
Forgotten Battle Towers
Ice and Fire
Just a lot more enchantments
Locks-Unofficial
Reforging Station
Refurbished Furniture
Spartan Weaponry
Spartan Fire
Thirst was Taken
Item Physics
No Tree Punching

</details>




This mod is very configurable



# Tweaks/Fixes: 


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Vanilla:**

Changes lightning to not destroy items upon impact


Makes Fire Resistance/Creative Mode not set entities on fire nor show the fire overlay on screen


Makes the player able to hit entities through grass without breaking the grass

Made instant health potions heal equivalent to the damage that instant damage does


Added an option to disable all advancements in game

Added a feature where crossbows can use all bow enchantments

Added a config option to enable friendly fire so the player cannot damage tamed creatures

Added a config to blacklist items and potions from the creative tab

**Blessfulled:**

Adds compatibility with PML to fix crit numbers not being displayed




**Carry-on:**

Adds compatibility with Locks-Unofficial to prevent locked chests from being able to be picked up




**Dungeon Crawl:**


Adds a configurable chance for dungeon mobs with armor/tools to spawn with curse of vanishing




**Dynamic Trees:**


Adds a configurable chance for sticks to drop from dynamic tree leaves




**Forgotten Battle Towers:**


Adds compatibility with Locks-Unofficial to allow interacting with locked chests without angering the golem




**Ice and Fire:**


Fixes wrong dragon scale armor values


Fixes dragons not being able to break Dynamic Trees


Makes fire resistance and ice resistance (cold sweat) grant immunity to their corresponding dragon breath type


Disabled enchantment glow on dragon blooded weapons iceandfire/spartanfire


**Just a lot more enchantments:**


Makes supreme sharpness damage values configurable



Added an option to make non-tradable enchantments or rune enchantments tradable from jlme



**Reforging Station:**

Adds mage qualities to curio accessories from irons spellbooks


Makes any reforge-able item try to get their repair material for reforging


Adds a configurable item list that makes any listed item able to recieve qualities with their corrosponding type, comes with cataclysm weapons and ice and fire hippogryph/dragon armors able to recieve qualities by default

Fixed jump height attribute not reducing fall damage

Fixed damage resistance attribute not reducing damage taken

Fix qualities ticking on all entities instead of just the player, with a config list to add more entities if needed

Added blacklist configs for items that should not recieve qualities

Greatly improved performance of item qualities

Added a configurable chance to receive a normal quality

Made reforging station not able to roll a normal quality



**Refurbished Furniture:**

Adds a configurable option to increase the max crate rows from 3 -> 6



**Spartan Weaponry:**


Adds a configurable option to disable the oil tooltip "Can be coated with a Weapon Oil"



**Spartan Fire**

Heavily nerfed dragonsteel weapons from spartanfire

Removed legendary weapon tooltip from spartanfire weapons


**Thirst was Taken:**

Adds compatibility with Alexs Caves to allow purple soda liquid to be drinked by hand



Added tweak for thirstwastaken that slightly drains thirst when attacking entities/drawing bow/casting spells

**Item Physics:**

Added fix for Air showing as a pickupable item tooltip for ItemPhysics



**No Tree Punching:**


Fixed an issue when picking up rocks from notreepunching when using itemphysics from pull request #337

</details>


None of these mods are required and are all optional
